history.content:
<thought>
I am currently at row 07, column F, facing downwards. The goal is at row 05, column E. I need to move to the right and downwards to reach the goal. The cell in front of me is blocked by a wall. I can turn right and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing right. The goal is at row 05, column E. I need to move down and to the right. The cell in front of me is a wall, so I need to turn left and then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing right. The goal is at row 05, column E. I can move forward and reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing down. The goal is at row 05, column E. The cell in front of me is a floor cell. I can move forward and reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
